hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git (commit|push)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "REMINDER: You just committed/pushed code. Before this session ends, check if .claude/map.md needs updating to reflect any component, route, API endpoint, DB table, or business logic changes made in this flow. Update the Last updated date and all relevant feature sections."}}'; fi
